about.title: My
about.subtitle: Computer engineering student at ENSPY, with a Bachelor's degree in Mathematics.
about.paragraph1: Passionate about emerging technologies, I specialize at the intersection of AI, cybersecurity, and data science. My goal is to develop innovative solutions to solve complex societal problems.
about.paragraph2: My background in mathematics gives me a unique analytical approach to technological challenges, while my chess practice strengthens my ability to anticipate problems and develop effective strategies.
about.featureAiDesc: ML/DL model development and AI research
about.featureDataDesc: Complex data analysis and advanced visualizations
about.featureChessDesc: Competitive practice to sharpen analytical thinking
about.featureSportDesc: Daily physical activity for mental balance
about.hobby: Film enthusiast — especially sci-fi movies and tech documentaries
